# HDR Test Sample Licenses

## Ultra HDR JPEG Gain Map Samples
- **Source**: [NMoroney/Awesome-Gain-Maps](https://github.com/NMoroney/Awesome-Gain-Maps)
- **License**: MIT
- **Files**: `ultrahdr_colorful_daisies.jpg`, `ultrahdr_gray_chart.jpg`,
  `gain_mapped-photo-laser_milky_way.jpg`, `gain_mapped-photo-tokyo.jpg`,
  `gain_mapped-photo-phi_falls.jpg`, `gain_mapped-test_chart-gray_51.jpg`
- **Format**: Ultra HDR JPEG (ISO 21496-1 gain map, MPF container)

## Jellyfin HDR Test Videos
- **Source**: [Jellyfin test videos](https://repo.jellyfin.org/test-videos/)
- **License**: CC BY-SA
- **Files**: `jellyfin_1080p_hevc_hdr10.mp4`, `jellyfin_1080p_dv_p8.4.mp4`
- **Format**: HEVC 10-bit HDR10 (PQ/BT.2020) and Dolby Vision Profile 8.4 (HLG/BT.2020)

## Dolby Vision Profile 8.4
- **Source**: [FFmpeg FATE suite](http://fate-suite.ffmpeg.org/hevc/)
- **License**: FFmpeg test data (permissive, used for testing)
- **Files**: `dolby_vision_84.mov`
- **Format**: HEVC 10-bit, BT.2020, HLG (iPhone-style DV 8.4)

## HDR10+ Sample
- **Source**: [FFmpeg FATE suite](http://fate-suite.ffmpeg.org/hevc/)
- **License**: FFmpeg test data (permissive, used for testing)
- **Files**: `hdr10plus_sample.hevc`
- **Format**: HEVC 10-bit, BT.2020, PQ (ST 2094-40 dynamic metadata)

## HDR Vivid Sample
- **Source**: [FFmpeg FATE suite](http://fate-suite.ffmpeg.org/hevc/)
- **License**: FFmpeg test data (permissive, used for testing)
- **Files**: `hdr_vivid_sample.hevc`
- **Format**: HEVC 10-bit, BT.2020, HLG (Chinese HDR standard)
